sections.paragraph:
- Original: προενάρχομαι

- Transliteration: Proenarchomai

- Phonetic: pro-en-ar'-khom-ahee

- Definition:

1. to make a beginning before

- Origin: from G4253 and G1728

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4253 and G1728; to commence already: - begin (before).
